text: You really gonna think this one over, Gramm?
Come on, Gramm, don’t tell me you’re sweating a mere 375 gp into a pot that’s practically begging for it!
Oh, Gramm, I can almost smell the sweat from here—are you really going to let that pot slip through your fingers?
Mandore, are you weighing your options, or just counting your coins?
"Come on, Mandore, don’t tell me you’re sweating fifty gold with that stack.
Fifty gold into a pot that big?
Look at you, Toni, deep in thought.
